testModifications.reasoning: No test files were modified by the implementer

criteria.criterion: AC1: When comment create form renders, comment body input uses markdown editor write/preview UI
AC2: Given user edits existing comment body and saves, client calls PATCH /comments/:id with updated body
AC3: Given comment edit save succeeds, updated comment body shown in thread render
criteria.evidence: Line 97: await refreshComments() re-fetches comments after successful edit

criteria.criterion: AC4: Given comment edit save fails, inline edit draft is preserved
criteria.evidence: Catch block (lines 99-102) does not reset editingId or editDraft - draft is preserved

criteria.criterion: AC5: Given comment edit save fails, localized error toast is shown

issues.description: comments.toast.updated key was missing from both en.json and zh.json

fixes.description: Added missing 'updated' key to comments.toast in en.json and zh.json
fixes.reasoning: The code uses t('comments.toast.updated') but this key did not exist, which would cause toast to display the key itself or empty string

reasoning: All 28 story-scoped tests pass. Implementation correctly uses MarkdownEditor for comment body input, calls PATCH /comments/:id for edits, refreshes comments on success, preserves draft on failure, and shows error toast. Fixed missing i18n key for comment update success message.
